mapper.select: SELECT bc.comment_id, bc.book_id, bc.user_id, bc.content, bc.create_time, bc.deleted, u.username, u.role FROM book_comment bc LEFT JOIN user u ON bc.user_id = u.user_id WHERE bc.book_id = #{bookId} AND bc.deleted = 0 ORDER BY bc.create_time DESC

SELECT bc.comment_id, bc.book_id, bc.user_id, bc.content, bc.create_time, bc.deleted, u.username, u.role FROM book_comment bc LEFT JOIN user u ON bc.user_id = u.user_id WHERE bc.comment_id = #{commentId} AND bc.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book_comment ( book_id, user_id, content, create_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{bookId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{createTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book_comment WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND deleted = 0
